---
title: "Pol Carbó Mestre"
image: "gallery/pol2.png"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/polcarbo/"
  - label: Twitter
    url: "https://twitter.com/PCarbMest"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/pcarbomestre"
  - label: Email
    url: "pcarbomestre@bren.ucsb.edu"
output:
  postcards::jolla
site: distill::distill_website
---

Passionate about sea-related issues, I have dedicated my career to environmental science and ocean exploration. After receiving my B.S. in Marine Science, I participated in several marine projects as an environmental science technician working in field research. Currently, I am studying a Master of Environmental Science and Management at UCSB.
